author: James Boyce
name: 11L Int6 Challenger 8xH100 Pre-Roundtrip
blurb: Non-record 8xH100 main-track-style attempt using an 11-layer int6 challenger workbench. Training reached 1.1624 pre-roundtrip BPB at the 600s cap, but the provider terminated the pod during export before a final post-roundtrip score could be recorded.
notes: RunPod terminated the strongest 8xH100 run during export before final roundtrip evaluation completed.
